text.title: Solo Niche Narrative — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a `PositioningStatement` output. The agent must satisfy this contract before returning.

list.item: `statement_primary` — string in the form "I am the <X> for <Y> who need <Z>."
`statement_alternatives` — array of 3 alternatives differing in only one of X/Y/Z
`drift_from_prior` — object `{x_changed: bool, y_changed: bool, z_changed: bool}` (at least one true OR `stable: true`)
`evidence_strength` — enum {strong, medium, weak} per r1 cohort coverage

antipattern.description: <X> is a job-title noun without a domain qualifier ("developer", "consultant", "designer").
antipattern.reason: Generic X collapses positioning to "I do things". Buyers searching for help cannot resolve the operator from competitors.

antipattern.description: <Y> defined by a demographic ("startups", "small businesses") rather than by an evidenced behaviour or stage.
antipattern.reason: Demographic Ys hide the actual cohort. "Series-A SaaS spending > $5k/mo on AWS" is a usable Y; "startups" is not.

antipattern.description: <Z> written in marketing voice ("scale faster", "unlock growth", "transform").
antipattern.reason: Violates r2 — verbatim customer language required. Marketing synonyms strip the recognition signal.

antipattern.description: `excluded_cohorts` field empty or contains a generic ("we exclude tire-kickers").
antipattern.reason: Violates r3. Exclusion must cite real lost-deal evidence.

antipattern.description: `statement_alternatives` differ from `statement_primary` only by punctuation, capitalisation, or synonym substitution.
antipattern.reason: Cosmetic alternatives are noise. Each alternative must vary X, Y, or Z meaningfully.

list.item: Anonymise customer names (Customer-A, Customer-B) for sharing outside operator's machine.
Aggregate revenue in 10%-buckets to protect financial data.
Trim verbatim quotes to ≤ 120 chars preserving numbers and named tools.

text.reference: JSON Schema the output must validate against.

list.item: X is a domain-qualified role, not a generic noun.
Y is evidence-backed and includes ≥ 70% revenue cohort.
Z contains verbatim quote from ≥ 3 cohort customers.
If `recommended_action == run-problem-validation`, do NOT emit a new statement.
